hadith_entries.text:
1018. Narrated A'isha; 'Qoraysh got worried About the
woman of Bano Makhzoom that stole. They said; 'Who can
intercede for her with the Messenger of Allah?' It was said;
'No body but Osamah ibn Zayd, the beloved one to the
Messenger of Allah .' Osamah talked to the Messenger of
Allah .The Messenger of Allah said: "Do you intercede
to prevent a prescribed penalty of Allah?" He then delivered a
sermon where he said: "Naught ruined those before you
except that: "If a dignitary among them committed theft, they
used to let him unharmed and if a weak person among them
committed theft, they used to affect the prescribed penalty on
him. And by Allah, has Fatimah, daughter of Muhammad
committed theft, I would cut off her hand." (AtTermizi).
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
